# JobsByCulture

> Culture-first job search for AI & tech professionals. Browse 8,985+ jobs filtered by culture values like async-first, work-life balance, remote-friendly, and ethical AI.

**Full version with embedded content:** [llms-full.txt](https://jobsbyculture.com/llms-full.txt)

## About

JobsByCulture helps professionals find jobs at companies whose culture actually matches how they like to work. Instead of generic job boards, we tag every role with real culture data from employee reviews.

## Key Pages

- [Browse Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/jobs): 8,985+ AI & tech jobs filtered by 18 culture values, 12 role categories, and 8 locations
- [Compare Cultures](https://jobsbyculture.com/compare): Side-by-side company culture comparison tool
- [Company Directory](https://jobsbyculture.com/directory): All 57 profiled companies with ratings, values, and reviews
- [Culture Map](https://jobsbyculture.com/culture-map): Interactive scatter chart comparing all 45 companies by Glassdoor rating vs work-life balance
- [Culture Quiz](https://jobsbyculture.com/quiz): "What's Your Work Culture Type?" — 90-second quiz with 6 archetypes (Deep Work Monk, Remote Explorer, Mission Hacker, Startup Sprinter, Culture Architect, Growth Engineer) and matching company recommendations

## Company Profiles

- [Anthropic](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/anthropic): 4.4 Glassdoor, AI Safety, 95% recommend
- [Hugging Face](https://jobsbyculture.com/companies/huggingface): 3.8 Glassdoor, Open Source, 78% recommend

## Browse by Seniority

- [Entry / Junior Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/entry): Early-career roles at culture-first companies
- [Mid-Level Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/mid): Mid-level roles at companies that value culture
- [Senior Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/senior): Senior IC roles at top-rated AI & tech companies
- [Staff / Principal Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/staff): Staff and principal-level roles for deep experts
- [Lead / Manager Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/lead): Team lead and manager roles at culture-first companies
- [Director+ Jobs](https://jobsbyculture.com/seniority/director): Director, VP, and executive-level roles

## Blog — The Culture Report

Data-driven insights on AI company culture, work-life balance, and what it's actually like to work at top tech companies.

- [Best AI Companies for Work-Life Balance in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/best-ai-companies-work-life-balance-2026): All 45 companies ranked by WLB score — from Vast AI (4.5) to Scale AI (2.7)
- [Anthropic vs OpenAI: Culture Compared](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/anthropic-vs-openai-culture-comparison): Side-by-side comparison of Glassdoor ratings, culture values, compensation, and employee reviews
- [Remote-Friendly AI Companies Hiring in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/remote-friendly-ai-companies-hiring-2026): 11 companies with genuine remote culture and real open roles
- [Flat Hierarchy in Tech](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/flat-hierarchy-tech-companies): 8 companies where flat hierarchy is real — with Glassdoor data and employee reviews
- [Working at Anthropic in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-anthropic-2026): Culture, compensation ($300k–$490k), Glassdoor ratings (4.4), and real employee reviews
- [Working at Stripe in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-stripe-2026): Engineering culture, writing culture, compensation, and what 8,000 employees say
- [Working at Perplexity AI in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-perplexity-2026): Highest Glassdoor (4.7) but low WLB (3.3) — the real story behind the AI search startup
- [Working at CoreWeave in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-coreweave-2026): GPU cloud hypergrowth, $50B valuation, and what employees say about the culture
- [Best AI Companies to Work For in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/best-ai-companies-to-work-for-2026): All 45 companies ranked by Glassdoor rating — from Vast AI (5.0) to Cohere (2.9)
- [Working at OpenAI in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-openai-2026): Culture, compensation ($350k–$550k), Glassdoor ratings (4.5), and real employee reviews
- [Working at Databricks in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-databricks-2026): 791 open jobs, $62B valuation, and what employees say about the data platform culture
- [Open Source AI Companies Hiring in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/open-source-ai-companies-hiring-2026): 9 open source companies with 729 jobs — Hugging Face, LangChain, Vercel, and more
- [Highest Paying AI Companies in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/highest-paying-ai-companies-2026): All 45 companies ranked by total compensation — OpenAI leads at $350k–$550k
- [Working at Google DeepMind in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-deepmind-2026): Culture, compensation ($300k–$500k), Nobel Prize research, and best WLB among frontier labs (4.0)
- [Best AI Startups to Join in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/best-ai-startups-to-join-2026): 11 startups under 500 employees ranked by Glassdoor — 619 open jobs from Vast AI to Cohere
- [OpenAI vs DeepMind: Culture Compared](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/openai-vs-deepmind-culture-comparison): Ship-fast vs deep-work cultures — Glassdoor (4.5 vs 4.2), WLB (3.6 vs 4.0), and compensation
- [Best AI Companies for Work-Life Balance in San Francisco (2026)](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/best-ai-companies-work-life-balance-san-francisco-2026): 27 companies with SF jobs ranked by WLB score — from Supabase (4.8) to Scale AI (2.7), 1,847 open jobs
- [Best AI Companies for Work-Life Balance in New York (2026)](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/best-ai-companies-work-life-balance-new-york-2026): 26 companies with NYC jobs ranked by WLB score — from incident.io (4.5) to Scale AI (2.7), 1,005 open jobs
- [Working at Cursor in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-cursor-2026): Culture, compensation ($200k–$400k), Glassdoor ratings (4.0), and what it's like inside the 50-person AI code editor team
- [Working at Airbnb in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-airbnb-2026): Live and Work Anywhere policy, Glassdoor 4.1, $180k–$350k TC, and what 7,300 employees say about remote culture
- [Working at Supabase in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-supabase-2026): 4.8 Glassdoor but 3.0 WLB — the paradox of 100% recommend with relentless pace. Open source, fully remote, $5B valuation
- [Working at Together AI in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-together-ai-2026): Open-source AI cloud — 4.1 Glassdoor, $3.3B valuation, $300M revenue, FlashAttention creators, and what employees say
- [Working at Mistral AI in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-mistral-2026): Europe's fastest AI unicorn — 4.0 Glassdoor, $14B valuation, 141 open roles, and what employees say about building frontier AI from Paris
- [How Many Employees Do Top AI Companies Have in 2026?](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/ai-company-employee-count-2026): Updated headcount for 45 AI & tech companies with growth signals, hiring ratios, and what team size means for culture
- [Culture Fit Interview Questions: 50+ Questions by Company Value](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/culture-fit-interview-questions): 50+ interview questions organized by 18 culture values, backed by Glassdoor data from 45 companies — for hiring managers and candidates
- [Working at Grafana Labs in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-grafana-labs-2026): 4.1 Glassdoor, 100% remote, engineers rate it 4.9/5, $400M+ ARR — what 205 employee reviews say
- [Best AI & Tech Companies for Engineers in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/best-ai-companies-for-engineers-2026): 45 companies ranked by engineering culture, autonomy, comp, and open source — 1,644 live engineering jobs
- [Anthropic Remote Work Policy 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/anthropic-remote-work-policy-2026): Is Anthropic remote friendly? Only 7% of 443 roles are remote. Office locations, which roles qualify, and what employees say
- [Working at Datadog in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-datadog-2026): 4.2 Glassdoor, $200k–$400k TC, 454 open roles. Engineering culture, compensation, and what 6,000 employees say
- [Working at Cloudflare in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-cloudflare-2026): 3.9 Glassdoor, 529 open roles. Mission-driven internet infrastructure with legendary postmortem culture
- [Stripe Layoffs 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/stripe-layoffs-2026): Stripe laid off 14% in 2022. Now 8,000 employees, 512 open roles, 4.0 Glassdoor. The full recovery story
- [Working at HubSpot in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-hubspot-2026): 4.3 Glassdoor, 90% recommend, Culture Code company. 276 open roles with genuine remote-first flexibility
- [Working at Figma in 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/working-at-figma-2026): 3.7 Glassdoor, 3.1 WLB, Large (~2,800), $437K median TC. Culture, salary, and what employees say
- [Anthropic Compensation 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/anthropic-compensation-2026): $300k–$490k TC, 4.8/5 comp score (highest in database). Full salary, equity, bonus breakdown vs OpenAI, DeepMind, Stripe
- [AI Jobs in Paris 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/ai-jobs-paris-2026): 220 AI & tech jobs from 13 companies — Mistral AI (95), Datadog (55), Databricks (24), Hugging Face. Europe's AI capital
- [AI Hiring Trends 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/ai-hiring-trends-2026): 7,101 open roles analyzed across 45 companies. Hiring intensity rankings — Mistral AI at 145% of headcount, Databricks leads with 836 roles
- [Employer Brand Benchmarks 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/employer-brand-benchmarks-ai-2026): All 45 AI companies ranked by Glassdoor. Median 4.2, from Vast AI (5.0) to Cohere (2.9). What separates top employer brands
- [Grafana Labs Culture Comparison 2026](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/grafana-labs-culture-comparison-2026): 4.1 Glassdoor, 4.3 WLB, $9B valuation. Compared to Supabase, Figma, LangChain, Hugging Face, and Databricks on culture, comp, and remote policies
- [Questions to Ask Anthropic in Your Interview](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/questions-to-ask-anthropic-interview): 15 culture-specific reverse interview questions based on real Glassdoor data — AI safety mission, work intensity, career growth, remote policy, compensation
- [Questions to Ask OpenAI in Your Interview](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/questions-to-ask-openai-interview): 15 culture questions for OpenAI candidates — mission direction, safety team departures, for-profit equity, internal politics, work intensity
- [Questions to Ask Stripe in Your Interview](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/questions-to-ask-stripe-interview): 15 culture questions for Stripe candidates — writing-first eng culture, transparency, scale vs bureaucracy, late-stage equity
- [Questions to Ask DeepMind in Your Interview](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/questions-to-ask-deepmind-interview): 15 culture questions for DeepMind candidates — research freedom, Brain merger dynamics, Google bureaucracy, ethical AI inside Alphabet
- [Questions to Ask Databricks in Your Interview](https://jobsbyculture.com/blog/questions-to-ask-databricks-interview): 15 culture questions for Databricks candidates — open-source roots at scale, IPO equity, learning culture, engineering autonomy

## Culture Values We Track

1. Work-Life Balance
2. Remote-Friendly
3. Flexible Hours
4. Async-First
5. Deep Work / Low Meetings
6. Transparent
7. Flat Hierarchy
8. Diverse & Inclusive
9. Safe to Fail
10. Engineering-Driven
11. Ship Fast & Iterate
12. Open Source
13. Learning & Growth
14. Strong Comp & Equity
15. Direct Product Impact
16. Wears Many Hats
17. Ethical AI / Safety
18. Mission-Driven

## Data Sources

Company culture ratings are sourced from Glassdoor employee reviews, public company culture documents, and verified employee feedback. AI-generated analysis uses Anthropic Claude for companies not yet profiled.

## Contact

Website: https://jobsbyculture.com
